title: Global Average Annual Insured Losses from Extreme Events in Excess of $120 Billion, New Report from Verisk Finds
text: Analysis highlights key factors that contribute to increase in insured losses: the number and value of properties exposed to risk, natural variability when losses occur, climate change, and man-made loss drivers Analysis highlights key factors that contribute to increase in insured losses: the number and value of properties exposed to risk, natural variability when losses occur, climate change, and man-made loss drivers

title: Blitz Tackles Growing Cannabis Insurance Market with Verisk Solutions
text: Specialty Insurance Carrier Uses Verisk's High-Quality, Small Commercial Analytics, Automated Rating Updates, and Enhanced Policy Language to Insure Cannabis and Other Emerging Businesses Specialty Insurance Carrier Uses Verisk's High-Quality, Small Commercial Analytics, Automated Rating Updates, and Enhanced Policy Language to Insure Cannabis and Other Emerging Businesses

title: Verisk Continues to Expand Its Property Estimating Ecosystem with Integration of Yembo's 3-D Models and AI-Driven Insights
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., Sept. 19, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Property insurance adjusters can further accelerate and refine their claims handling in Verisk's Xactimate solution by using interactive, 3-D models and detailed content inventories from Yembo, the global leader in virtual home surveys and inspections.

title: Insurers Can Now Target Both Profitability and Growth with Enhanced Verisk Solution
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., Sept. 15, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Insurers looking to find opportunities for profitable growth amid economic volatility can now leverage new insights from Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider. Verisk has launched Profitability Advisor on the MarketStance Commercial Insight platform, further enhancing an already powerful commercial lines market analysis tool.

title: Verisk Announces Expanded Integration of 360Value® on Duck Creek Platform
text: Verisk Solution Enables Homeowners Insurers to Quickly Access Claims-Driven Replacement Cost Estimates through Duck Creek's Content Exchange Verisk Solution Enables Homeowners Insurers to Quickly Access Claims-Driven Replacement Cost Estimates through Duck Creek's Content Exchange

title: Here's Why Investors Should Hold on to Verisk (VRSK) Stock
text: Strategic buyouts and shareholder-friendly measures boost Verisk (VRSK). However, low liquidity is a downside.
